textPlain: Trusting a random vendor, even on your home network, seems crazy. But how do you secure a home network? Are we all supposed to be running Nagios, Grafana, Splunk, and have a personal CISO?

> Trusting a random vendor, even on your home network, seems crazy.Random vendors who promise unlimited free streaming, no less. Even if they're not paying for the content those streams still cost good money to run so they're obviously monetizing the boxes in some other way.
